ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Madhya Pradesh, West Bengal) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the cases occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the cases */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Specific date of the offense */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., assault, theft) */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "offender_age" INTEGER /* Age of the offender */,
  "offender_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the offender */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  "known_offenders_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases where offenders were known to the victims */,
  "neighbors_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases where offenders were neighbors */,
  "other_known_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases where offenders were other known persons */,
  "family_members_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases where offenders were parents or close family members */,
  "relatives_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases where offenders were relatives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offense_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investigator, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES offense_cases ("case_id")
)
